---
title: "Publications"
description: "Publications, manuscripts, and conference abstracts by Shixiong Hu."
---

::: {.eyebrow}
Publications & Works
:::

# Recent scholarly output.

[Full Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=bmFRpDwAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate){.text-link}

::: {.publication-list}
::: {.publication-card}
**2026**

### Diagnostics of the K-Pg full-emission simulation suite and climate-refugia potential mapping

Working manuscript and methods framework based on CESM2-WACCM/CARMA full-emission sensitivity experiments.

*In Development, expected soon*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**2026**

### Evidence for the origins of soot emissions from the Chicxulub asteroid impact at the Cretaceous-Paleogene boundary

Hu, S., Tabor, C. R., Bardeen, C. G., Toon, O. B.

*Ready to Submit*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**2025**

### Isotopic evidence from a Brazos River Cretaceous/Paleogene boundary section consistent with a pulse of greenhouse warming shortly after the Chicxulub impact

MacLeod, K. G., Huber, B. T., Tabor, C., Mitra, S., Wheatley, R., Harrison, C., and others.

*Global and Planetary Change 253, 104924 - 3 citations on Scholar*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**2024**

### Simulating the effects of emissions from meteor impacts

Hu, S., Tabor, C. R., Bardeen, C., Robertson, D.

*AGU Fall Meeting Abstracts 2024, NH54A-03*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**2024**

### The impacts of ultraviolet radiation damage on phytoplankton productivity: From paleoclimate to future projections

Coupe, J. L., Lovenduski, N. S., Gleason, L., Bardeen, C., Tabor, C. R., Hu, S., and others.

*American Geophysical Union, Ocean Sciences Meeting, OB24B-0767*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**2023**

### Exploring the effects of organic coating on soot emission at the Cretaceous-Paleogene mass extinction event

Hu, S., Tabor, C. R., Bardeen, C.

*AGU Fall Meeting Abstracts 2023, PP53E-1135*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**2023**

### Simulating ultraviolet radiation damage of phytoplankton at the K-Pg boundary in CESM2-MARBL

Coupe, J. L., Lovenduski, N. S., Gleason, L., Bardeen, C., Tabor, C. R., Hu, S., and others.

*AGU Fall Meeting Abstracts 2023, PP53E-1138*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**2022**

### Emission uncertainties of soot from an asteroid impact at the Cretaceous-Paleogene mass extinction event

Hu, S., Tabor, C. R., Bardeen, C.

*AGU Fall Meeting Abstracts 2022, NH12C-0297*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**2021**

### Evaluation of the health risk of air pollution in major Chinese cities using a risk-based, multi-pollutant air quality health index during 2014-2018

Liao, T., Jiang, W., Ouyang, Z., Hu, S., Wu, J., Zhao, B., Wang, B., Wang, S., Sun, Y.

*Air Quality, Atmosphere & Health 14, 1605-1617 - 9 citations on Scholar*
:::
:::
